seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is named Michael
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient presented because of symptoms that concerned his primary care provider
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's primary care provider ordered a CT scan before this visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient went in for a regular visit with his primary care provider
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: During the regular visit the patient reported having back pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's back pain is usually on the left side
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The primary care provider advised the patient to see this clinician for the back pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's back pain is sometimes sharp
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's back pain is sometimes not sharp
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The location of the patient's back pain sometimes moves
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The location of the patient's back pain sometimes does not move
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's back pain is mostly on the left side
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not been more tired than usual recently
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's appetite is unchanged
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has been drinking a lot more water than usual
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient wakes up at night to urinate more than he normally does
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes that the patient has increased urine output
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient rides a bike every so often
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient did not watch March Madness
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports that school is going well
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports getting good grades in school
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports that many people around him are sick these days
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Most of the patient's siblings are healthy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a brother who smokes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has told his brother not to smoke
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has told his brother not to smoke in the house
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: There is a smoker in the patient's home
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states that having a smoker at home can affect the patient
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes a history of recurrent strep throat in the patient
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states the patient has had about four strep throat episodes in the last five months
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient confirms having recurrent strep infections
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports episodes of sore throat associated with being told he has strep
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient expresses trust in his primary care doctor's diagnosis of strep
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's throat shows no erythema
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's throat shows no swelling
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's tonsils are midline
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the clinician finds no cervical lymphadenopathy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states there are no physical signs of strep infection at this visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On lung auscultation the clinician hears no wheezes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On lung auscultation the clinician hears no rales
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On lung auscultation the clinician hears no rhonchi
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On cardiac exam the clinician hears no murmur
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On cardiac exam the clinician hears no rub
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On cardiac exam the clinician hears no gallop
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has no tenderness on palpation of the area of left back pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has no abdominal pain on palpation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On abdominal exam there is no rebound tenderness
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On abdominal exam there is no guarding
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The CT scan shows findings concerning for glomerulonephritis
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician suspects that the patient's recurrent strep episodes may have caused glomerulonephritis
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician is concerned that glomerulonephritis could lead to chronic kidney disease
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to refer the patient to ENT for evaluation of glomerulonephritis-related problems
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician wants ENT to consider tonsillectomy to help with the patient's recurrent strep
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a lipid panel
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a urinalysis
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a comprehensive metabolic panel
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a complete blood count
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a vitamin D level
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a TSH test
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states that these labs will provide information about the patient's hormones, iron levels, nutrition, and body function
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is concerned about the cost of the ordered tests
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician tells the patient that his mother will pay for the tests
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician prefers the patient to get the labs done as soon as possible
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: There is a blood lab next door where the patient can get blood drawn after the visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Some of the planned tests require the patient to be fasting
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
